notes: Feedback-progress archetype, circular peer of progress-bar. SVG-driven: two concentric arcs (track + value) with optional centered label/icon and external helper row.

Three variants: filled (default, solid track + colored arc), outlined (semi-transparent track), soft (role-tinted container track + same arc). Stroke-width add allows the outlined variant to compensate for the lighter track visually.

Roles brand|danger|warning|info|success|neutral expose two slots each (--ring-{role}-fill / -soft-track) — no separate label colour because the centered label inherits surface text via --ring-label-color. data-role swaps the internal --_rg-* chain.
Track is intentionally NEUTRAL in filled variant (--surface-base-cm-bg); only the value arc carries role colour.
Has NO interactive states (hover/focus/pressed) by design — progressbar is a status output, not an input.
Direction token (--ring-direction) allows clockwise/counter-clockwise sweep; rotation token (-90deg default) places the sweep origin at top.
